query: We're launching a new beauty brand storefront on top of our existing Storefront Next template. I need to set up a brand new vertical with its own color palette, a green primary accent, and a dark header. Where do I change the brand tokens?
Create a new furniture vertical for our storefront — different brand colors, a serif heading font, and its own logo treatment, without forking the shared components.
I want to re-skin the whole storefront for a second brand. How do I change the brand palette and verify the primary button still passes WCAG contrast in both light and dark mode?
Our designer gave me a new brand theme. I need to update src/theme/tokens/brand.css with the new palette and keep local dev rendering with fixtures since we don't have SCAPI credentials yet.
How do I spin up a new storefront variant (a vertical) and decide which changes belong in tokens versus an extension versus a base component slot?
Add a new route with a loader that fetches product recommendations from SCAPI and streams them with Suspense.
My storefront build is failing the bundle size check after adding a charting library. How do I code-split it and get back under the limit?
How do I configure i18next namespaces and add a new locale to my Storefront Next project?
I need to deploy my storefront to Managed Runtime and promote the new bundle to production.
Write a Vitest unit test and a Storybook interaction test for my new product tile component.
